_comment: Defines every tool Forge has. trust_level is the minimum level required to use it.

analyze_command_output.description: Receive and store terminal output pasted by Nic for analysis. Never executes anything.

apply_patch.description: Apply an approved patch to a file. Requires explicit Nic approval.

snapshot_live_execute_show.description: Show the latest Patch 94 live restore execution receipt.

snapshot_live_preflight.description: Create a Forge-owned read-only live restore preflight report checking current target hashes without restoring anything.

snapshot_live_preflight_export.description: Export live restore preflight reports as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No restore authority.

snapshot_live_preflight_gate.description: Validate the live restore preflight gate. No restore authority; checks report safety only.

snapshot_live_preflight_policy.description: Show Patch 89 live restore preflight policy. No restore, no copy, no project writes.

snapshot_live_preflight_show.description: Show a live restore preflight report. Read-only display of Forge-owned report.

snapshot_live_proposal.description: Create a Forge-owned live-restore proposal gate report from a Patch 87 inspection. No restore or project writes.

snapshot_live_proposal_export.description: Export Patch 88 live-restore proposal index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No live restore.

snapshot_live_proposal_gate.description: Validate Patch 88 live-restore proposal invariants. Read-only; no restore authority.

snapshot_live_proposal_policy.description: Show Patch 88 live restore proposal gate policy. Proposal-only; no live restore authority.

snapshot_live_proposal_show.description: Show latest or selected Patch 88 live-restore proposal report. Read-only.

snapshot_live_restore_dry_run.description: Create a Forge-owned live restore candidate dry-run receipt bound to the latest Patch 90 approval token. No restore authority.

snapshot_live_restore_export.description: Export Patch 91 live restore candidate dry-run receipts as JSON and Markdown index files.

snapshot_live_restore_gate.description: Validate the latest or specified Patch 91 live restore candidate dry-run receipt. No restore authority.

snapshot_live_restore_policy.description: Show Patch 91 live restore candidate command dry-run policy. Dry-run only; no restore, no project writes.

snapshot_live_restore_show.description: Show the latest or specified Patch 91 live restore candidate dry-run receipt.

snapshot_manifest_dry_run.description: Write a Forge-owned dry-run hash manifest receipt for future snapshots. Does not copy project files or grant restore authority.

snapshot_manifest_export.description: Export the snapshot manifest dry-run index as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned memory. Does not copy project files.

snapshot_manifest_show.description: Show a snapshot manifest dry-run receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_manifest_validate.description: Validate dry-run snapshot manifest invariants: no copy, no restore, hashes present. Read-only.

snapshot_plan.description: Write a Forge-owned forensic snapshot plan receipt. Does not copy project files and does not restore anything.

snapshot_policy.description: Show Patch 80 snapshot planning policy. Plan/export only; no snapshot creation or restore authority.

snapshot_readiness_blockers.description: Show blockers/warnings from a snapshot readiness receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_readiness_check.description: Verify latest dry-run snapshot manifest and write Forge-owned readiness receipt. No snapshot creation or restore.

snapshot_readiness_export.description: Export snapshot readiness receipt index as JSON and Markdown under Forge-owned memory. No snapshot creation or restore.

snapshot_readiness_policy.description: Show Patch 82 snapshot manifest verify / snapshot-create readiness gate policy. Read-only.

snapshot_readiness_show.description: Show a snapshot readiness receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_shadow_copy.description: Copy verified snapshot archive files into a Forge-owned shadow sandbox under memory/shadow_restores_v1. No live restore or project writes.

snapshot_shadow_copy_export.description: Export Patch 86 shadow copy receipt index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No live restore.

snapshot_shadow_copy_policy.description: Show Patch 86 shadow restore copy sandbox policy. Forge-owned shadow copy only; no live restore.

snapshot_shadow_copy_show.description: Show the latest or selected Patch 86 shadow copy receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_shadow_copy_verify.description: Verify copied shadow files against snapshot receipt hashes. Read-only verification; no restore.

snapshot_shadow_export.description: Export shadow restore plan index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No copy or restore authority.

snapshot_shadow_inspect.description: Inspect a verified Patch 86 shadow copy and write a live-restore readiness report. No restore or project writes.

snapshot_shadow_inspect_export.description: Export Patch 87 shadow restore inspection index as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No live restore.

snapshot_shadow_inspect_policy.description: Show Patch 87 shadow restore inspection policy. Report-only; no live restore authority.

snapshot_shadow_inspect_readiness.description: Show readiness blockers/warnings from a Patch 87 inspection report. Read-only; no live restore.

snapshot_shadow_inspect_show.description: Show the latest or selected Patch 87 shadow restore inspection report. Read-only.

snapshot_shadow_plan.description: Write a Forge-owned shadow restore plan from a snapshot create receipt. Does not copy or restore files.

snapshot_shadow_policy.description: Show Patch 85 shadow restore plan policy. Plan-only; no copy or restore authority.

snapshot_shadow_show.description: Show a shadow restore plan receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_shadow_validate.description: Validate a shadow restore plan receipt and confirm no copy/restore authority. Read-only.

snapshot_show.description: Show one snapshot plan receipt. Read-only.

snapshot_verify_index.description: Verify all snapshot create receipts and copied snapshot files. Writes Forge-owned verification index only; no restore authority.

source_law_chunk_export.description: Export latest Patch 97A source-law chunk/retrieval probe report. Forge-owned report write only.

source_law_chunk_gaps.description: List source-law chunk/retrieval proof gaps and next routes. Read-only.

source_law_chunk_policy.description: Show Patch 97A source-law chunk/retrieval probe policy. Read-only.

source_law_chunk_probe.description: Probe existing context receipts/manifests/indexes and local Chroma sqlite metadata for source-law chunk/retrieval proof. Writes Forge-owned report only.

source_law_chunk_show.description: Show one Patch 97A source-law chunk/retrieval probe row. Read-only.

source_law_review_audit.description: Audit whether source-law documents are registered, extracted, chunked, ingested, and retrievable before LLM review. Writes Forge-owned reports only.

source_law_review_export.description: Export Patch 97 source-law readiness report as Forge-owned JSON/Markdown. No ingestion or engine review.

source_law_review_gaps.description: List source-law readiness gaps and route to extraction/ingestion branches. Read-only.

source_law_review_policy.description: Show Patch 97 source-law context readiness policy. Read-only; no ingestion, OCR, or engine review authority.

source_law_review_show.description: Show one source-law readiness row from the latest Patch 97 report. Read-only.

source_law_review_status.description: Show the latest source-law context readiness report summary. Read-only.

test_inventory.description: Read-only inventory of indexed test files, configs, logs, and engine test coverage. Does not execute tests.

test_policy.description: Show the safe-test policy and future execution allowlist rules. Does not execute tests.

test_readiness.description: Read-only readiness summary for future safe test runner integration.

test_run_history.description: List recent safe test run reports.

test_run_policy.description: Show Patch 64 allowlisted safe test runner policy. Does not execute tests.

test_run_report.description: Read one safe test run report from Forge-owned memory/test_run_reports.

test_run_safe.description: Run one explicit allowlisted Python test target using subprocess argv with shell=False. Writes only test run reports.

test_run_smoke.description: Create a Forge-owned smoke Python file and compile it through the Patch 64 safe runner.

test_show.description: Read-only display of test inventory rows by path, framework, or engine.

write_proposed_patch.description: Write a patch proposal to ~/forge/proposed_patches/. NEVER modifies project files. Nic applies manually.
